◎简　　介  

　　Theo goes looking for someone who can tell him about his dad and the person he loved. His quest leads him into the Alps, where George h as been living as a recluse for ten years. As they meet, the two men start to make sense of their lives."The who postpones the hour of living is like the rustic who waits for the river to run out before he crosses" (Horace)
